evidence.text: A high-quality internal platform mitigates this risk by acting as the essential distribution and governance layer for AI. It provides the automated, standardized, and secure pathways necessary to turn AI’s potential into systemic organizational improvements. By ensuring that AI-generated code is consistently tested, secured, and deployed, a platform allows an organization to harness the speed of AI without sacrificing stability.
